prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年东北大学在天津市综合类最低录取位次分别为约5070名→5245名→6137名→5647名→5535名。2023年位次明显后移至6137名，2024年回升至5647名，2025年进一步前移至5535名，近两年呈前移趋势，2025年基准位次约5535名；该校在天津市综合类招生计划2021–2024年均为55人，2025年增至56人，2026年（招生计划文件）进一步增至57人，较2025年扩招1人，扩招幅度约1.8%，对竞争压力有轻微缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第38名，近年排名稳定在36–39名区间，属于中上游985院校，综合实力较强；2026年高考周期内学校声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及秦皇岛校区命名争议，未出现明显负面舆情；2025年周期曾有一次实习安全事故事件，但未形成持续负面冲击；抖音热度排名第82位，评价为一般，短视频平台关注度不高，整体报考热度平稳；第五轮学科评估中，控制科学与工程获评A+，计算机科学与技术、冶金工程获评A，软件工程、机械工程、材料科学与工程获评A-，共6个A-及以上学科，工科实力突出，与当前高热度的计算机类、电子信息、自动化等专业方向高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业在2024–2026年均为高热推荐或推荐状态，与东北大学优势学科高度契合，可能吸引更多高分考生报考；天津市综合类考生总数从2021年54025人持续增长至2025年71938人，2026年预计约82000人，增幅约14%，考生规模扩大使竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次近两年前移趋势、2026年招生计划小幅扩招1人、天津市考生总数持续增长（2026年预计约8.2万人，较2025年增长约14%）、学校声誉平稳、优势学科与热门专业高度匹配等因素，扩招对位次的缓解效应不及考生规模增长带来的竞争加剧效应。预测2026年最低录取位次约5514名，较2025年5535名小幅前移约21名，区间5014–6014名。

- 自动化类（自动化、电气工程及其自动化等）
- 软件工程（特色班）。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约5514名，区间5014–6014名。位次在区间中上段（约5200名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（计算机、人工智能、自动化类）；位次在区间中段（约5500名附近）建议以二档专业为主、一档冲刺、三档保底；位次在区间下段（约5800名以外）建议以三档专业为主、二档冲刺。东北大学工科实力突出，控制科学与工程A+、计算机A等优势学科与当前社会高热专业方向高度匹配，报考热度有望维持。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Northeastern University in Tianjin's comprehensive category were approximately 5070 → 5245 → 6137 → 5647 → 5535. In 2023, the ranking significantly dropped to 6137, rebounded to 5647 in 2024, and further advanced to 5535 in 2025, showing a forward trend in the past two years, with a baseline ranking of about 5535 in 2025. The enrollment plan for comprehensive category in Tianjin was 55 students from 2021 to 2024, increased to 56 in 2025, and further increased to 57 in 2026 (according to the enrollment plan document), an increase of 1 student compared to 2025, with an expansion rate of about 1.8%, slightly alleviating competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeastern University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 38th, with stable rankings in the 36–39 range in recent years, making it a mid-to-upper tier 985 university with strong comprehensive strength. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the school's reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving the naming controversy of the Qinhuangdao campus, with no significant negative public opinion. In the 2025 cycle, there was one internship safety incident, but it did not have a sustained negative impact. Douyin popularity ranking is 82nd, rated as average, with low attention on short video platforms, and overall application enthusiasm is stable. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Control Science and Engineering was rated A+, Computer Science and Technology and Metallurgical Engineering were rated A, Software Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and Materials Science and Engineering were rated A-, totaling 6 disciplines at A- or above. The engineering strength is outstanding, highly matching current high-demand majors such as computer science, electronic information, and automation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation have been highly recommended or recommended in 2024–2026, highly aligned with Northeastern University's advantageous disciplines, potentially attracting more high-scoring candidates. The total number of comprehensive category candidates in Tianjin has continuously increased from 54,025 in 2021 to 71,938 in 2025, and is expected to be about 82,000 in 2026, an increase of about 14%, intensifying competition due to the expansion of the candidate pool.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the forward trend of historical rankings in the past two years, the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan by 1 student, the continuous growth of the total number of candidates in Tianjin (expected to be about 82,000 in 2026, an increase of about 14% compared to 2025), stable school reputation, and high alignment between advantageous disciplines and popular majors, the mitigating effect of enrollment expansion on rankings is less than the intensifying effect of competition due to candidate pool growth. The predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 5514, a slight forward movement of about 21 places compared to 5535 in 2025, with a range of 5014–6014.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Computer Science and Technology
- Artificial Intelligence (Future Technology College/Zhixing Class)
- Automation (Automation, Electrical Engineering and Automation, etc.)
- Software Engineering (Special Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Robotics Engineering
- Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering
- Computer Science (Software Engineering, Information Security, Virtual Reality Technology)
- Mechanical Engineering (Mechanical Engineering, Vacuum Engineering and Technology, etc.)
- Economics and Management Experimental Class.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Materials Science and Engineering (Materials Science and Engineering, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (1) (Metallurgical Engineering, Environmental Science, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (2) (Mineral Processing Engineering, Civil Engineering, etc.)
- Energy and Power Engineering
- Architecture (Architecture, Urban and Rural Planning).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 5514, with a range of 5014–6014. Candidates with rankings in the upper-middle part of the range (within about 5200) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Automation). Candidates with rankings in the middle part (around 5500) are advised to prioritize Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 as a sprint and Tier 3 as a safety. Candidates with rankings in the lower part (outside about 5800) are advised to prioritize Tier 3 majors, with Tier 2 as a sprint. Northeastern University's engineering strength is outstanding, with advantageous disciplines such as Control Science and Engineering (A+) and Computer Science (A) highly matching current socially popular majors, and application enthusiasm is expected to be maintained.
